notes: The 1x4 multichip decoder raises the batch-32 full-stack capacity from the single-chip functional stage's 3999-token limit to 12224 logical tokens. TP=4 shards every projection and both KV caches, while layer-independent RoPE and fixed-address decode workspaces are shared by the sequential layer stack. Every logical sequence length from 1 through 12224 is supported; internal tile, DRAM-bank, and page padding is not exposed as an aligned-only public contract. Logical length 12225 rounds its paged cache to 12288 physical tokens and reaches a measured device-DRAM allocation failure. The remaining reduction from the HF-advertised 32768 context is a hard physical capacity limit.

capacity_evidence.hardware: four Blackhole p300c devices, 1x4 FABRIC_1D_RING, eight DRAM banks per device
capacity_evidence.workload: allocator- and shape-faithful reservation for all 64 TP=4 decoder layers: five separate width-sharded decode projections/layer; four separate interleaved prefill tensors/layer including packed gate/up; 128 separate local two-head BFP8 K/V caches; separately padded norm and bias tensors; one shared four-table RoPE set; one shared persistent decode CCL/position/page-table workspace; the ownership-aware peak BF16 prefill live set; and reserved future TP4 BFP8 embedding/untied LM-head/final-norm residency

advertised_context_impossibility.note: At batch 32 and sequence 32768, the TP-sharded local KV caches alone require 36.507 GB/device and exceed physical p300c DRAM before weights, RoPE, trace reservation, activations, CCL buffers, or allocator constraints.

decode_trace_state.components: two 32x128 BF16 RoPE tiles, 32 uint32 lookup indices, and 32 int32 cache-update indices
decode_trace_state.lifecycle: one fixed-address position/RoPE-output set is passed to every sequential decoder layer and refreshed by host-to-device writes; embedding lands in the preallocated outputs before replay, with no device allocation or per-position retention during replay
decode_trace_state.page_table_lifecycle: one replicated int32 page table is likewise shared and refreshed in place; traced paged decode was validated after a physical block remap and position advance
decode_trace_state.layer_independent_residency: SharedRotaryTables owns one TILE+ROW_MAJOR cos/sin set; SharedDecodeCollectiveBuffers owns one ping-pong AG/RS workspace reused after each layer consumes it

source_precision_policy.qkv_o_gate_up_down_weights: BFLOAT8_B after load-time fusion or transposition

translation.functional_precision_policy: All weights, biases, and activations use BFLOAT16 for this correctness-first stage; source BFLOAT8_B weight casts are intentionally not retained.
translation.optimized_single_chip_baseline: advisor_packed_bfp8_hifi2_1d: BFP8 attention/MLP weights and KV cache, BF16 activations/norms/residual, HiFi2 math, packed QKV and packed MLP

multichip_precision_policy.mesh: 1x4 FABRIC_1D_RING, TP=4 on mesh axis 1, two links
multichip_precision_policy.local_attention: 10 Q heads and 2 KV heads/device; BFP8/LoFi weights; QKV local logical 1792 padded with 256 inert channels to physical 2048; decode SDPA uses an 8x4 grid and owns the internal GQA head padding
multichip_precision_policy.local_mlp: 6912 logical intermediate channels/device padded with 256 inert channels to physical 7168; one packed BFP4/LoFi gate+up projection on 32 cores and a BFP4/LoFi down projection on 16 cores
multichip_precision_policy.kv_cache: BFP8, 2 local KV heads/device for both contiguous and paged cache
multichip_precision_policy.collectives: BF16 Ring; two hidden all-gathers and two row-parallel reduce-scatters/layer; two-link persistent decode buffers shared across sequential layers; no layer-boundary gather, reduce, or reshard
multichip_precision_policy.decode_residual_contract: BF16 TILE L1 WIDTH_SHARDED hidden-width fracture, logical [1,32,1,1280] per rank; the canonical consumer view is [1,1,32,1280] on a 10x2 grid with [32,64] shards; public-view reshape metadata is ignored when physical placement is identical
multichip_precision_policy.decode_grids: 20-core local residual, 16-core full norm/QKV/down, 32-core packed gate+up, independently tuned 8-core O projection, and 8x4 SDPA
multichip_precision_policy.prefill_program: 10x10 grid with in0-block limit 10; retained after a measured 8x10 and block-limit 10/16/20/32 sweep, with larger candidates rejected by latency or exact L1 circular-buffer limits
multichip_precision_policy.prefill_memory: packed gate/up; projection chunks are at most 640 rows; row-parallel O/down chunks reduce-scatter before concatenation
